Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(CASE WHEN streak_15m != 0 THEN 1 END\) as has_streak_15m, COUNT\(CASE WHEN pattern_hash != '' THEN 1 END\) as has_pattern FROM kb_snapshots;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT COUNT\(CASE WHEN change_15m != 0 THEN 1 END\) as has_change15m, COUNT\(CASE WHEN volume_ratio != 1 THEN 1 END\) as has_volratio, COUNT\(CASE WHEN direction IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END\) as has_direction FROM kb_snapshots;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\), MIN\(ts\), MAX\(ts\), COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE direction IN \('up','down'\)\) as with_direction FROM kb_snapshots;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT id, side, direction, share_price, size_usdc, close_reason, status, ts_entry FROM poly_orders WHERE ts_entry > \(EXTRACT\(EPOCH FROM NOW\(\)\) - 3600\) * 1000 ORDER BY ts_entry DESC LIMIT 15;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT key, value FROM settings WHERE key LIKE '%signal%' OR key LIKE '%streak%' OR key = 'trading_mode';")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); h=d.get\('history',[]\); print\(f'points={len\(h\)}, first_t={h[0][\\"t\\"] if h else None}, last_t={h[-1][\\"t\\"] if h else None}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/pm_max.json'\)\); h=d['history']; print\(f'points={len\(h\)}'\); print\(f'first_t={h[0][\\"t\\"]}'\); print\(f'last_t={h[-1][\\"t\\"]}'\); import datetime as dt; print\('first=', dt.datetime.fromtimestamp\(h[0]['t']\)\); print\('last=', dt.datetime.fromtimestamp\(h[-1]['t']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/pm_1m.json'\)\); h=d['history']; import datetime as dt; span=\(h[-1]['t']-h[0]['t']\)/60 if h else 0; print\(f'1m+fidelity=10: points={len\(h\)}, span_min={span:.0f}'\)")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT id, parent_order_id, side, signal_path, close_reason, status, share_price, size_usdc, mode, source, clob_order_id IS NOT NULL AS has_clob, to_timestamp\(ts_entry/1000\) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS ts FROM poly_orders WHERE source = 'auto' AND ts_entry > extract\(epoch from now\(\) - interval '6 hours'\) * 1000 ORDER BY ts_entry DESC LIMIT 30;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT p.id, p.market_id, p.side, p.signal_path, p.close_reason, p.status, p.share_price, p.size_usdc, p.ts_entry, m.window_start::text FROM poly_orders p LEFT JOIN poly_clob_markets m ON m.condition_id = p.market_id WHERE p.source = 'auto' AND p.ts_entry > extract\(epoch from now\(\) - interval '90 minutes'\) * 1000 ORDER BY p.ts_entry DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT id, side, close_reason, share_price, size_usdc, \(size_usdc / share_price\) AS shares_approx, \(size_usdc\) AS notional FROM poly_orders WHERE source='auto' AND side='sell' AND close_reason='tp' AND mode='live' AND ts_entry > extract\(epoch from now\(\) - interval '2 hours'\) * 1000 ORDER BY ts_entry DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT p.id, p.market_id, p.direction, p.size_usdc, p.share_price, m.token_up, m.token_down, m.window_end::text FROM poly_orders p JOIN poly_clob_markets m ON m.condition_id = p.market_id WHERE p.source='auto' AND p.side='buy' AND p.status='pending' AND p.mode='live' ORDER BY p.ts_entry DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT p.id, p.market_id, p.direction, p.size_usdc, p.share_price, m.token_up, m.token_down, m.window_end::text FROM poly_orders p JOIN poly_clob_markets m ON m.condition_id = p.market_id WHERE p.source='auto' AND p.side='buy' AND p.close_reason='tp' AND p.mode='live' ORDER BY p.ts_entry DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT condition_id, token_up, token_down, window_start::text, window_end::text FROM poly_clob_markets WHERE window_end::bigint > extract\(epoch from now\(\)\) * 1000 ORDER BY window_end LIMIT 1;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT id, parent_order_id, side, signal_path, close_reason, status, share_price, size_usdc, clob_order_id IS NOT NULL AS has_clob, to_timestamp\(ts_entry/1000\) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS ts FROM poly_orders WHERE source='auto' AND mode='live' AND ts_entry > extract\(epoch from now\(\) - interval '60 minutes'\) * 1000 ORDER BY ts_entry DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT id, side, signal_path, share_price, size_usdc, clob_order_id IS NOT NULL AS has_clob, to_timestamp\(ts_entry/1000\) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS ts FROM poly_orders WHERE source='auto' AND mode='live' AND ts_entry > extract\(epoch from now\(\) - interval '20 minutes'\) * 1000 ORDER BY ts_entry DESC;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'poly_orders' ORDER BY ordinal_position;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT token_up, window_start::text, window_end::text FROM poly_clob_markets ORDER BY window_start DESC LIMIT 3;" -t -A)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='poly_clob_markets' ORDER BY ordinal_position;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE outcome IS NULL\) AS pending, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE outcome IS NOT NULL\) AS synced, COUNT\(*\) AS total FROM poly_clob_markets WHERE window_end::bigint < extract\(epoch from now\(\)\)*1000 - 60000;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT symbol, COUNT\(*\) AS total, MIN\(window_start\)::bigint AS oldest_start, MAX\(window_end\)::bigint AS newest_end FROM poly_clob_markets GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY symbol;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading psql -h localhost -U trading -d trading -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='poly_clob_markets' AND column_name IN \('window_start','window_end','outcome','outcome_fetched_at'\);")

Bash(SERVICE_NAME=smoke LOG_LEVEL=info npx tsx -e " import { log } from '@trading-bot/core/logger'; log\('info', 'smoke test', { hello: 'world' }\); log\('warn', 'warning sample', { n: 42 }\); log\('error', 'error sample'\); // Give pino worker a moment to flush setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 500\); ")
